style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Nidoking's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plating. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into metallic dust particles drifting upward. A cold, intense blue aura surrounds its form, casting stark geometric shadows that accentuate its angular silhouette. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
